title: Cover all installed Swift AlgoTest agent integrations in the verified migration
description: Cover all installed Swift AlgoTest agent integrations in the verified migration
no_spec_change_rationale: This change records lifecycle coverage for the already-installed agent integration files after they became meaningful paths; it does not change AlgoTest source, tests, dependencies, canonical requirements, or public APIs.
acceptance_criteria: Strict hosted-equivalent SpecSync accepts every meaningful agent integration path as covered; Claude
and Gemini report installed; Swift builds and all 83 tests pass; no source
